name: Mydei | STRESSED
description:
⋆˚✿˖° | gods get stressed, too, you know? and your man NEEDS you to pleasure him asap!

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ───

any pov | M4A | user is the god/goddess of love and beauty | requested | established relationship | nsfw intro | heavy smut | user is hinted to be on the dominant side

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ───

context. mydei’s always pent up with stress. he often tries to take out that energy by fighting and sparring, and yeah it does the trick sometimes. but it’s been getting repetitive… and mydei needs to release that stress in a different way.

luckily he’s got the god (or goddess) of love and beauty to relieve all that tension in the way he wants. just help mydei out in any way you can wink wink

I’ve left the intro message kinda open ended, so you have more freedom to choose which smut route you wanna go. you can pound him or he can pound you whatever. but it leans more towards user topping mydei

roleplay info…

☆ user is the god / goddess of love and beauty ☆

☆ established relationship ☆

☆ game: honkai star rail (HSR) ☆

creator yapping (notes)

I’ve returned with a potential banger. And my indecisive ass could not choose on god of love or beauty so I went with both oops

LLM has not been cooking with the responses lately so i can’t help that whatsoever. hopefully it gets fixed soon because all I’m getting is repetitive nonsense 🫠
